label: same-source-closest-parity-patched

mapping.nvfp4_mlp_weights: packed values and E4M3 block scales repacked losslessly into GGUF NVFP4; reciprocal global/input scales stored as F32 auxiliaries
mapping.fp8_attention_weights: dequantized using per-channel scales and stored as BF16
mapping.classification: closest parity only; not exact format parity

limitations: The upstream unpatched converter still rejects the mixed compressed-tensors schema.
The quality fixture has measured autoregressive drift; no acceptance threshold has been adopted.
A profiler-level native-kernel invocation trace remains required before accepting performance claims.
